title: eremochloa ciliaris
intro: Eremochloa ciliaris, also known as the Blue Grasstree or Blue Grass Tree, is a type of evergreen shrub native to Australia and New Caledonia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eremochloa ciliaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Eremochloa ciliaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
